testcase.name: VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > VOICE_CHAT_TOOLS exports 5 tools with correct names
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > dispatch: get_current_step called with correct name
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > dispatch: search_history called with keyword arg
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > dispatch: query_diagnosis emits tool_result chunk
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > dispatch: get_today_tasks emits tool_call + tool_result
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > L1 Buffer: pushTurn called twice (user+assistant) per turn
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > L1 Buffer: getTurns called with accountId=1, limit=10
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > L1 Buffer: clearSession calls clearBuffer
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > subscription: yields delta + tool_call + tool_result + done chunks
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > tool_call: dispatch result injected into tool_result chunk
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > fallback: no stream() → yields error chunk
VoiceChatAgent (US-011) > timeout: stream error chunk → yields error and stops
[Integration] VoiceChatAgent 3-turn L1 Buffer (AC-10) > 3 turns: 3 user + 3 assistant turns in L1 Buffer
[Integration] VoiceChatAgent 3-turn L1 Buffer (AC-10) > clearBuffer removes all turns
